患者对医生选择意愿的影响因素研究
results.abstract: <jats:p>随着人民生活水平的不断提高,我国人民日益增长的医疗需求与医疗资源配置不充分、不合理之间的矛盾日益突出。互联网技术的不断发展,充分推动了在线咨询行业的快速发展。利用该技术合理分配医疗资源,建立分级医疗服务体系,提高在线咨询平台的用户耐心,增加就诊人数,具有重要意义。当前,在网络医学领域中很少有从患者的角度去探讨关于患者如何选择医生的研究。基于此,我们不考虑短期不稳定的因素,而是研究患者选择医生的意愿的影响因素,并以此为基础收集相关数据做出如下分析。</jats:p>

results.title: Alpha‐globin gene triplication and its effect in beta‐thalassemia carrier, sickle cell trait, and healthy individual
results.tldr: The genotype and phenotype correlation between coinheritance of heterozygous beta‐thalassemia with the alpha‐globin triplication is unclear and its effect on hematological and phenotypical changes is investigated.
results.abstract: The genotype and phenotype correlation between coinheritance of heterozygous beta‐thalassemia with the alpha‐globin triplication is unclear and its effect on hematological and phenotypical changes is investigated.

results.title: Impact of β-thalassemia trait carrier state on cardiovascular risk factors and metabolic profile in patients with newly diagnosed hypertension
results.tldr: Among patients with newly diagnosed hypertension, those with Tm have a better overall CRF and metabolic profile, beyond the well-known differences in serum lipids, compared with men, and women seem to be at least equally protected.
results.abstract: Among patients with newly diagnosed hypertension, those with Tm have a better overall CRF and metabolic profile, beyond the well-known differences in serum lipids, compared with men, and women seem to be at least equally protected.

中西医结合护理对高血压脑出血患者生活质量的影响
results.abstract: <jats:p>目的：总结中西医结合护理服务模式对于高血压脑出血患者的影响。方法：在 2019 年 3 月至 2020 年 4 月开展研究。研究期间随机入选高血压脑出血患者进行研究。入选时采用随机数表法分组，常规组应用西医护理模式，实验组应用中西医护理模式。对比两组患者的康复相关指标。结果：实验组患者的疗效指标明显优于常规组，对比差异较大，P＜0.05。实验组患者的生活质量指标数据优势明显，对比差异较大，P＜0.05。结论：中西医护理方案可有效应用于高血压脑出血患者，可以显著提高患者的生活质量，成本低收益高，值得普及。</jats:p>

results.title: Anemia among Medical Students from Jakarta: Indonesia—Iron Deficiency or Carrier Thalassemia?
results.tldr: DNA analysis can identify specific mutations associated with alpha-thalassemia, distinguishing between iron deficiency anemia and the alpha-thalassemia trait.
results.abstract: DNA analysis can identify specific mutations associated with alpha-thalassemia, distinguishing between iron deficiency anemia and the alpha-thalassemia trait.

results.title: Classification of α-thalassemia data using machine learning models
results.tldr: A larger dataset could enhance ML model generalization and the impact of feature extraction, especially with resampling, as well as enhance the effects of grouping silent- and non-carriers.
results.abstract: A larger dataset could enhance ML model generalization and the impact of feature extraction, especially with resampling, as well as enhance the effects of grouping silent- and non-carriers.

results.title: Advancing Alpha-Thalassemia Carrier Screening for Better Predictions Using Explainable AI

results.title: 新形势下水文地质因素对于地质灾害的影响研究
results.abstract: <jats:p>我国的国土面积十分辽阔,经纬度跨越极大,这样的 特 点 导 致 我 国 南 北 方 在 地 质 结 构 及 水 文 条 件 上 存 在 较 大 差 异,因此我国常常会出现各种类型的地质灾害问题。因此,本文对水下地质因素对地质灾害的影响作用进行了深入分析。</jats:p>

results.title: Impact of &bgr;-thalassemia trait carrier state on inflammatory status in patients with newly diagnosed hypertension
results.tldr: Thalassemia minor is followed by a favorable inflammatory profile that may contribute to the overall better cardiovascular health of the carriers.
results.abstract: Thalassemia minor is followed by a favorable inflammatory profile that may contribute to the overall better cardiovascular health of the carriers.

results.title: HbA2 levels in children with β-thalassemia trait associated with iron deficiency: A perspective for pediatricians
results.tldr: HbA2 can be used as a screening test in children with β-thalassemia trait, despite accompanying iron deficiency, and may be the result of underlying thalassemia mutation, not the result of accompanying iron deficiency.
results.abstract: HbA2 can be used as a screening test in children with β-thalassemia trait, despite accompanying iron deficiency, and may be the result of underlying thalassemia mutation, not the result of accompanying iron deficiency.

Thalassemia in Bangladesh: progress, challenges, and a strategic blueprint for prevention
results.tldr: This review systematically synthesizes all available data on the prevalence, clinical characteristics, management challenges, and socio-economic implications of thalassemia in Bangladesh, offering a blueprint for a prevention strategy tailored to its unique socio-economic and cultural context.
results.abstract: This review systematically synthesizes all available data on the prevalence, clinical characteristics, management challenges, and socio-economic implications of thalassemia in Bangladesh, offering a blueprint for a prevention strategy tailored to its unique socio-economic and cultural context.

results.title: Accuracy of Red Blood Cell Parameters in Predicting α0-Thalassemia Trait Among Non-Anemic Males
results.tldr: MCH and MCV demonstrated excellent screening performance for identifying α0-thalassemia carriers in males, and the combination predictive model provided the best diagnostic performance, achieving an AUC of 0.987, which was slightly but significantly higher than that of any individual parameter.
results.abstract: MCH and MCV demonstrated excellent screening performance for identifying α0-thalassemia carriers in males, and the combination predictive model provided the best diagnostic performance, achieving an AUC of 0.987, which was slightly but significantly higher than that of any individual parameter.

results.title: Exploring the Clinical and Hematological Characteristics of Beta-Thalassemia Trait: A Comprehensive Analysis in a Tertiary Care Hospital Setting
results.tldr: It is concluded that regular monitoring of the Mentzer index along with HPLC analysis is an effective approach in identifying beta-thalassemia trait cases and further providing genetic counseling among the couples that will help in reducing high-risk pregnancy and the birth of a child with thalassemia major.
results.abstract: It is concluded that regular monitoring of the Mentzer index along with HPLC analysis is an effective approach in identifying beta-thalassemia trait cases and further providing genetic counseling among the couples that will help in reducing high-risk pregnancy and the birth of a child with thalassemia major.

results.title: High prevalence and molecular spectrum of β-thalassemia trait in Haripur and Abbottabad districts of Pakistan: implications for regional carrier screening programs
results.venue: Egyptian Journal of Medical Human Genetics
results.tldr: This study investigated the prevalence and mutational spectrum of β-thalassemia trait in Haripur and Abbottabad districts of northern Pakistan to better inform prevention strategies and underscores a concentrated genetic burden and the need for region-specific screening, premarital counseling, and expansion of molecular diagnostic services.
results.abstract: This study investigated the prevalence and mutational spectrum of β-thalassemia trait in Haripur and Abbottabad districts of northern Pakistan to better inform prevention strategies and underscores a concentrated genetic burden and the need for region-specific screening, premarital counseling, and expansion of molecular diagnostic services.

results.tldr: Although some genetic determinants seem to correlate more directly with β-thalassemia trait severity, such as mutations in SUPT5H, PIEZO1 and hereditary elliptocytosis, the difficulties of linking the contribution of other modulating factors are elucidated in this review.

抗焦虑治疗对高血压患者血压的影响
results.abstract: <jats:p>目的:为了调查抗焦虑治疗对高血压患者血压的影响。方法:收集神经内科高血 压患者 50 例，分别给予评分(焦虑自评量表 SAS);然后随机分成两组，分别为对照组和治 疗组，分别给予抗焦虑治疗、必要的心理疏导和一般降压治疗。测量治疗前后 24 小时平均 血压、白昼平均血压、夜间平均血压。结果:对照组的 24 小时平均血压、白昼平均血压、夜间 平均血压均明显高于治疗组，并且 8 周后治疗组的血压值明显低于对照组。结论:伴有焦虑 情绪的高血压患者加用抗焦虑治疗既能改善焦虑情绪，又能增加降压药物的疗效，同时能 减轻血管内皮功能的损伤。单纯的降压治疗方法降压效果不理想，抗焦虑治疗和必要的心 理疏导是有效的正确降压方法。</jats:p>

results.tldr: Combination of these two indices, MI and RDWI with final confirmation by HPLC would help to reduce the overall cost of screening in situations where the ideal screening approach of doing CBC and HPLC analysis of all individuals as a first step itself is not possible due to cost constraints.

results.title: Assessment of β-Thalassemia Trait Occurrence in an Outpatient Sample from Southern Chile: A Retrospective Study
results.tldr: A relatively low but non-negligible frequency of BTT in outpatients from southern Chile is demonstrated, emphasizing the importance of considering BTT in the differential diagnosis of microcytic anemia, a condition often underestimated in routine practice.
results.abstract: A relatively low but non-negligible frequency of BTT in outpatients from southern Chile is demonstrated, emphasizing the importance of considering BTT in the differential diagnosis of microcytic anemia, a condition often underestimated in routine practice.

results.title: Haematological indices as screening tool in distinguishing beta thalassemia trait and iron deficiency anaemia: Insights from a tertiary hospital study.
results.tldr: The aim of this study is to determine the utility of haematological indices as a screening marker in detecting cases of beta thalassemia carriers and differentiating it from IDA in the authors' tertiary care hospital.
results.abstract: The aim of this study is to determine the utility of haematological indices as a screening marker in detecting cases of beta thalassemia carriers and differentiating it from IDA in the authors' tertiary care hospital.

results.title: Serum ferritin-based assessment of iron deficiency anemia in individuals with β-thalassemia trait.
results.tldr: Iron deficiency reduced the red blood cell count, haemoglobin concentration, and MCV while it increased the RDW in BTT individuals (p<0.05), indicating that iron deficiency significantly affects the haematological indices in carriers of BTT.
results.abstract: Iron deficiency reduced the red blood cell count, haemoglobin concentration, and MCV while it increased the RDW in BTT individuals (p<0.05), indicating that iron deficiency significantly affects the haematological indices in carriers of BTT.

results.title: Red Cell Parameters in Beta Thalassemia Trait; Comparison between Iron Deficient and Non-Deficient Carriers
results.venue: Journal of Bahria University Medical and Dental College
results.tldr: Red Cell parameters and HBA2 levels in beta thalassemia trait vary significantly among the iron deficient vs non-deficient group, Hence due consideration is needed in screening of beta thalassemia trait in patients with iron deficiency anemia.
results.abstract: Red Cell parameters and HBA2 levels in beta thalassemia trait vary significantly among the iron deficient vs non-deficient group, Hence due consideration is needed in screening of beta thalassemia trait in patients with iron deficiency anemia.

results.tldr: It was concluded that the β-thalassemia trait is widespread across diverse ethnic groups and highlights the necessity for standardized blood testing protocols for β-thalassemia screening.
results.abstract: It was concluded that the β-thalassemia trait is widespread across diverse ethnic groups and highlights the necessity for standardized blood testing protocols for β-thalassemia screening.

一体化保温方案、ERAS手术室护理联合应用于肾结石患者手术中对于术中低体温的影响
results.abstract: <jats:p>目的:探究肾结石患者手术治疗期间联合应用一体化保温方案、ERAS手术室护理所取效果,评估对术中低体温的预防效果。方法:研究开始时间为2023年1月,结束于2025年3月,选择在上述时间段内择期采取手术治疗的肾结石患者60例为研究对象,根据随机数字表法分组处理,纳入对照组的30例患者采用常规护理,观察组则应用一体化保温方案+ERAS手术室护理,统计术中低体温等并发症发生率,对比两组患者不同时间点体温变化、围术期指标。结果:观察组术中低体温等并发症发生率较低于对照组(P<0.05);术前,就两组患者体表温度测定,数值对比未见明显差异(P>0.05),术中、术后不同时间段,对两组患者体表温度测定,观察组较对照组偏高,组间对比差异可见(P<0.05);分析入组对象围术期指标,观察组各指标测定数值较同期对照组偏低(P<0.05)。结论:肾结石患者采取手术治疗的同时辅以一体化保温方案、ERAS手术室护理对于术中低体温预防效果理想,可加速患者术后康复进程,通过稳定体表温度减轻生理应激反应,可借鉴。</jats:p>

results.title: 基于个体评估的全程生活指导对异常子宫出血患者心理状态及生活质量的影响
results.abstract: <jats:p>目的:探讨基于个体评估的全程生活指导对异常子宫出血(AUB)患者的影响。方法:以2023年1月至2023年12月收治的80例AUB患者对比研究,按照随机数字表法分为两组:对照组(n=40,常规护理);观察组(n=40,基于个体评估的全程生活指导)。比较两组干预前后心理状态[焦虑自评量表(SAS)、抑郁自评量表(SDS)]、生活质量[健康调查简表(SF-36)],并随访1年统计复发率。结果:干预后,观察组SAS、SDS评分低于对照组,SF-36各维度评分高于对照组(P<0.05)。随访1年,观察组复发率低于对照组(P<0.05)。结论:基于个体评估的全程生活指导可改善AUB患者心理状态,提高生活质量,降低复发率。</jats:p>

results.title: 地理标志对消费者购买意愿的影响研究——基于感知价值的中介作用
results.abstract: <jats:p>为探究地理标志与消费者购买意愿的内在关联及感知价值的中介效应，本文基于外部线索理论与 S-O-R理论，构建地理标志（自然环境、人文因素、政策支持）与感知价值（功能价值、情感价值、信任价值）的理论关联框架，系统解析地理标志通过价值感知传递影响消费决策的机理。研究明确地理标志多维属性对购买意愿的正向作用路径，证实感知价值的差异化中介角色，为地理标志产品市场化运营提供理论支撑。</jats:p>

水工环勘查中的水文地质条件影响及分析
results.abstract: <jats:p>本文着重论述了水文地质条件在水利勘测中的作用，并从水工环调查的角度论述了水文地质条件对工程建设、环境保护、资源利用等方面的影响。同时对水工环勘探中的水文地质条件进行了精确评价并提出了相应的对策。</jats:p>

Severe Anemia in a Thalassemia Trait Carrier with Peritoneal Tuberculosis: A Case Report
results.tldr: The severe anemia in this patient was likely due to multifactorial causes: an underlying thalassemia trait compounded by anemia of chronic disease (ACD) from tuberculosis, highlighting the critical need to investigate comorbidities in thalassemia carriers with atypical presentations.
results.abstract: The severe anemia in this patient was likely due to multifactorial causes: an underlying thalassemia trait compounded by anemia of chronic disease (ACD) from tuberculosis, highlighting the critical need to investigate comorbidities in thalassemia carriers with atypical presentations.

results.title: Mentzer Index As A Diagnostic Tool Of Thalassemia Trait In Children
results.venue: Journal of Bacha Khan Medical College
results.tldr: The Mentzer Index functions as an affordable diagnostic measure which efficiently determines beta thalassemia trait when testing limited resources and can support reductions in undiagnosed thalassemia carriers thus promoting better preventative healthcare practices.
results.abstract: The Mentzer Index functions as an affordable diagnostic measure which efficiently determines beta thalassemia trait when testing limited resources and can support reductions in undiagnosed thalassemia carriers thus promoting better preventative healthcare practices.

results.title: Evaluation of Frequency of Beta Thalassemia Trait Among Pregnant Females
results.venue: Journal of Islamabad Medical & Dental College
results.tldr: It is established, that the frequency of β-thalassemia trait amongst pregnant females was alarming, highlighting the importance of routine screening in antenatal clinics and a robust protocol for early identification of thalassemia carriers.
results.abstract: It is established, that the frequency of β-thalassemia trait amongst pregnant females was alarming, highlighting the importance of routine screening in antenatal clinics and a robust protocol for early identification of thalassemia carriers.

results.title: Prevalence and Hematological Profile of Beta Thalassemia Trait in an Urban Indian Population: A Cross-Sectional Study from Chandigarh
results.venue: Interdisciplinary Journal of the African Alliance for Research, Advocacy and Innovation
results.tldr: A significant prevalence of Beta Thalassemia Trait is revealed in Chandigarh, particularly among women of reproductive age, and findings support the expansion of urban thalassemia screening programs in India.
results.abstract: A significant prevalence of Beta Thalassemia Trait is revealed in Chandigarh, particularly among women of reproductive age, and findings support the expansion of urban thalassemia screening programs in India.

results.title: Impact of Iron Deficiency on HBA2 Levels and its Implications in Thalassemia Trait Detection
results.venue: International Journal of Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance
results.tldr: Iron deficiency significantly lowers HbA2 levels and may obscure the diagnosis of beta-thalassemia trait in screening programs, particularly in highprevalence regions like Bihar where iron deficiency anemia is common.
results.abstract: Iron deficiency significantly lowers HbA2 levels and may obscure the diagnosis of beta-thalassemia trait in screening programs, particularly in highprevalence regions like Bihar where iron deficiency anemia is common.

results.title: 1353-P: Asymptomatic Individuals with β-Thalassemia Trait in Southern China Having Falsely Low Hemoglobin A1c Levels Are Readily Identified by Their Low MCV, Low MCH, and High RDW Values
results.tldr: Misinterpretation of HbA1c levels can occur in patients with an undiagnosed β-thalassemia trait, readily identified by microcytosis, hypochromia, or an elevated RDW, although HbA1c levels in α-thalassemia carriers are generally unaffected when measured using HPLC, although these carriers might go unnoticed because their red blood cell parameters fall within the normal ranges.
results.abstract: Misinterpretation of HbA1c levels can occur in patients with an undiagnosed β-thalassemia trait, readily identified by microcytosis, hypochromia, or an elevated RDW, although HbA1c levels in α-thalassemia carriers are generally unaffected when measured using HPLC, although these carriers might go unnoticed because their red blood cell parameters fall within the normal ranges.

results.title: Two Novel SUPT5H Variants Causing β-Thalassemia Trait Phenotypes
results.tldr: The hematological profiles of all carriers of SUPT5H variants are consistent with previously reported heterozygous SUPT5H-related traits, underscoring the role of SUPT5H haploinsufficiency in modulating HBB regulation.
results.abstract: The hematological profiles of all carriers of SUPT5H variants are consistent with previously reported heterozygous SUPT5H-related traits, underscoring the role of SUPT5H haploinsufficiency in modulating HBB regulation.

results.title: Clinical Differentiation of Gilbert Syndrome, Crigler-Najjar Syndrome and β-Thalassemia Trait
results.venue: Journal of Clinical Medicine and Regenerative Medicine
results.tldr: Key distinguishing features of GS, Crigler-Najjar type 2, and β-thalassemia trait – including typical bilirubin levels, hematologic indices, genetic basis, and management – are summarized in a comparative table.
results.abstract: Key distinguishing features of GS, Crigler-Najjar type 2, and β-thalassemia trait – including typical bilirubin levels, hematologic indices, genetic basis, and management – are summarized in a comparative table.

results.title: Impact of Beta-Thalassemia Trait on Clinical Outcomes and Treatment Response in Chronic Myeloid Leukemia
results.tldr: Beta-thalassemia trait influences baseline hematologic profiles and risk stratification in CML but does not impair the effectiveness of tyrosine kinase inhibitors or survival, suggesting the need for closer anemia monitoring.
results.abstract: Beta-thalassemia trait influences baseline hematologic profiles and risk stratification in CML but does not impair the effectiveness of tyrosine kinase inhibitors or survival, suggesting the need for closer anemia monitoring.

results.title: Thalassemia carrier screening among the college going students of the rural areas of West Midnapore, India
results.venue: Proceedings of Indian National Science Academy
results.tldr: The screening for thalassemia should be included as a part of regular blood testing among the college going students which will provide idea about the extent of hemoglobinopathy in the rural area of West Midnapore.
results.abstract: The screening for thalassemia should be included as a part of regular blood testing among the college going students which will provide idea about the extent of hemoglobinopathy in the rural area of West Midnapore.

results.title: Evaluation of Red Blood Cell Indices and Reticulocyte Parameters for Thalassemia Carrier Screening Using the Dymind Automated Hematology Analyzer
results.venue: Journal of Health Science and Medical Research
results.tldr: The combined MCV and MCH analyzed using the Dymind automated hematology analyzers with the DCIP test, together with Ret-He parameters from the DH615, are effective for screening thalassemia and common abnormal Hb in the Thai population.
results.abstract: The combined MCV and MCH analyzed using the Dymind automated hematology analyzers with the DCIP test, together with Ret-He parameters from the DH615, are effective for screening thalassemia and common abnormal Hb in the Thai population.

results.title: Case Report: Acute hepatitis A virus infection presenting with direct antiglobulin test-negative autoimmune hemolytic anemia and α-thalassemia trait
results.tldr: A challenging case of Coombs-negative hemolytic anemia is presented as initial manifestation of hepatitis A virus infection in a silent carrier of α-thalassemia.
results.abstract: A challenging case of Coombs-negative hemolytic anemia is presented as initial manifestation of hepatitis A virus infection in a silent carrier of α-thalassemia.

results.title: Iron Deficiency Anaemia with Underlying Beta-Thalassemia Carrier in a Single Mother with Multiple Substance Abuse: A Case Report
results.venue: International Journal of Human and Health Sciences
results.tldr: This case report describes a 23-year-old single mother with a history of substance abuse and smoking, who was diagnosed with severe iron deficiency anemia during late pregnancy, which led to hospital admission, where she required transfusions and iron therapy.
results.abstract: This case report describes a 23-year-old single mother with a history of substance abuse and smoking, who was diagnosed with severe iron deficiency anemia during late pregnancy, which led to hospital admission, where she required transfusions and iron therapy.

results.title: Alpha-Thalassemia Unmasked in a Patient With Sickle Cell Trait: A Case Report
results.tldr: The case of a 59-year-old female with sickle cell trait and mild persistent microcytic anemia is presented and homozygous alpha-thalassemia via gap-polymerase chain reaction is confirmed via gap-polymerase chain reaction.
results.abstract: The case of a 59-year-old female with sickle cell trait and mild persistent microcytic anemia is presented and homozygous alpha-thalassemia via gap-polymerase chain reaction is confirmed via gap-polymerase chain reaction.

results.title: GLM-sPCA: An Approach in Carrier Screening for Binary Traits with an Application in Thalassemia Among Adult Males
results.venue: Journal of Statistical Theory and Applications (JSTA)
results.tldr: This study introduces the generalized linear model (GLM) to modify sPCA so that the GLM-sPCA is applicable in disease screening and its high performance can greatly benefit carrier screening and clinical diagnosis.
results.abstract: This study introduces the generalized linear model (GLM) to modify sPCA so that the GLM-sPCA is applicable in disease screening and its high performance can greatly benefit carrier screening and clinical diagnosis.

results.title: Red Blood Cell Indices as a Primary Tool for Carrier Screening of Thalassemia & E Disease in Pregnancy
results.tldr: During pregnancy red blood cell indices showing MCV ≤75 fl and/or MCH ≤23.5pg should be advised for Hb Electrophoresis for detection of defective Hb in the form of thalassemia trait, E trait or E disease.
results.abstract: During pregnancy red blood cell indices showing MCV ≤75 fl and/or MCH ≤23.5pg should be advised for Hb Electrophoresis for detection of defective Hb in the form of thalassemia trait, E trait or E disease.

results.title: Frequency of anemia in individuals with beta-thalassemia trait.
results.tldr: Burden of anemia among carriers of Beta-thalassemia traits is high, and understanding the prevalence of anemia in individuals with the trait is crucial for optimizing healthcare interventions and improving the quality of life for affected individuals.
results.abstract: Burden of anemia among carriers of Beta-thalassemia traits is high, and understanding the prevalence of anemia in individuals with the trait is crucial for optimizing healthcare interventions and improving the quality of life for affected individuals.

results.title: Screening of voluntary blood donors for beta-thalassemia trait in an endemic area in Northwest India for 15 years: Results and future directions after screening more than 300 thousand donors
results.tldr: This comprehensive screening program revealed a relatively high prevalence of Thalassemia trait in 2.29% of the screened population, and communities with higher prevalence were educated about the disease and a targeted screening program will be further carried out in these ethnic groups.
results.abstract: This comprehensive screening program revealed a relatively high prevalence of Thalassemia trait in 2.29% of the screened population, and communities with higher prevalence were educated about the disease and a targeted screening program will be further carried out in these ethnic groups.

results.title: Diagnostic accuracy of hematological indices and logistic regression for β-thalassemia carrier screening in children
results.tldr: Simple complete blood count-derived indices offer reliable, cost-effective screening for β-thalassemia carriers, potentially reducing unnecessary electrophoresis testing by 60% to 70% in resource-limited settings.
results.abstract: Simple complete blood count-derived indices offer reliable, cost-effective screening for β-thalassemia carriers, potentially reducing unnecessary electrophoresis testing by 60% to 70% in resource-limited settings.

results.title: Diagnostic performance of discriminant formulas and machine learning models for detecting β-thalassemia trait in Bangladesh
results.tldr: The combination of novel discriminant formula DF-6 and integration of XGB and SVM ML models can substantially strengthen nationwide screening programs to reduce the burden of thalassemia in Bangladesh.
results.abstract: The combination of novel discriminant formula DF-6 and integration of XGB and SVM ML models can substantially strengthen nationwide screening programs to reduce the burden of thalassemia in Bangladesh.

results.title: Exploring Transferrin Gene Expression as A Biomarker of Ineffective Erythropoiesis and Iron Overload in HbE/β-Thalassemia and β-Thalassemia Trait
results.tldr: Findings suggest that TfR1 and TfR2 expression patterns may serve as potential biomarkers for assessing IE and iron overload in β-thalassaemia and elevated sTfR levels indicated that the transfusion regimen was insufficient to suppress ineffective erythropoiesis.
results.abstract: Findings suggest that TfR1 and TfR2 expression patterns may serve as potential biomarkers for assessing IE and iron overload in β-thalassaemia and elevated sTfR levels indicated that the transfusion regimen was insufficient to suppress ineffective erythropoiesis.

results.title: Genetic Study for Identifying Beta Thalassemia Trait in Relatives of Children with Beta Thalassemia Major
results.tldr: The beta thalassemia carrier rate was found to be highly prevalent among relatives of beta thalassemia major children, and the value of tested gene study is still limited in the detection of carrier rates.
results.abstract: The beta thalassemia carrier rate was found to be highly prevalent among relatives of beta thalassemia major children, and the value of tested gene study is still limited in the detection of carrier rates.

results.title: SCREENING FOR β -THALASSEMIA TRAIT OR OTHER HEMOGLOBINOPATHIES IN FAMILIES OF THALASSEMIA MAJOR PATIENTS
results.venue: Journal of Population Therapeutics and Clinical Pharmacology
results.tldr: C cascade screening seems to be one of the most cost-effective approaches to identify carriers of beta thalassemia carriers in third world countries like us.
results.abstract: C cascade screening seems to be one of the most cost-effective approaches to identify carriers of beta thalassemia carriers in third world countries like us.

results.title: P5720Impact of β-thalassemia trait carrier state on inflammatory markers and body mass index in patients with newly diagnosed hypertension
DIAGNOSTIC ACCURACY OF RDWI TO DIFFERENTIATE IRON DEFICIENCY ANEMIA AND THALASSEMIA TRAIT IN BORDERLINE HBA2
results.tldr: RDWI is a good indicator to differentiate between IDA and beta thalassemia trait (sensitivity 76.6% and specificity 56.6%), but in all cases of borderline HbA2 genetic analysis should be done to see the mutation and to confirm the diagnosis.
results.abstract: RDWI is a good indicator to differentiate between IDA and beta thalassemia trait (sensitivity 76.6% and specificity 56.6%), but in all cases of borderline HbA2 genetic analysis should be done to see the mutation and to confirm the diagnosis.

results.title: β-thalassemia due to de novo mutation IVS1-5(G > C) at HBB gene in three cases from West Bengal
results.venue: Egyptian Journal of Medical Human Genetics
results.tldr: Three cases of de novo IVS1-5(G > C) mutation where father is carrier but mother is normal are reported, indicating that globin genes are one of the hotspots for DNA alterations in human genome and predispose the risk of disease in newborn even in healthy couples.
results.abstract: Three cases of de novo IVS1-5(G > C) mutation where father is carrier but mother is normal are reported, indicating that globin genes are one of the hotspots for DNA alterations in human genome and predispose the risk of disease in newborn even in healthy couples.

results.title: [Genetic screening and typing study of Thalassemia among ethnic Miao Group in Qianxinan area of China].
results.venue: Zhonghua yi xue yi chuan xue za zhi = Zhonghua yixue yichuanxue zazhi = Chinese journal of medical genetics
results.tldr: The detection rate of thalassemia among the ethnic Miaos from Qianxinan Prefecture is relatively high, which primarily consisted of α-thalassemia.
results.abstract: The detection rate of thalassemia among the ethnic Miaos from Qianxinan Prefecture is relatively high, which primarily consisted of α-thalassemia.

results.title: Ischemic Stroke as the Initial Presentation of Sickle Beta Thalassemia in an Adolescent: A Case Report
results.tldr: A 13-year-old girl presenting with sudden-onset right-sided weakness, facial deviation, and aphasia is reported, highlighting the quiet progression of hemoglobinopathies and the necessity for heightened clinical suspicion.
results.abstract: A 13-year-old girl presenting with sudden-onset right-sided weakness, facial deviation, and aphasia is reported, highlighting the quiet progression of hemoglobinopathies and the necessity for heightened clinical suspicion.

results.title: Sickle cell, thalassemia, and heat: risk estimates and equity policy considerations from an exploratory timeseries study in California
results.tldr: The relationship between daily apparent temperature and hemoglobinopathy-related hospitalizations in California using patient discharge data (PDD) and a two-stage timeseries study design with Poisson regression to estimate a state-wide hospitalization risk estimate was analyzed.
results.abstract: The relationship between daily apparent temperature and hemoglobinopathy-related hospitalizations in California using patient discharge data (PDD) and a two-stage timeseries study design with Poisson regression to estimate a state-wide hospitalization risk estimate was analyzed.

results.title: Associations between Serum Ferritin Levels, Age-stratified Hematological Parameters, and Hemoglobin A2 Levels in Iraqi Beta Thalassemia Carriers
results.tldr: Serum ferritin levels are evaluated in Iraqi BTT carriers and correlate them with HbA2, erythrocyte indices, and age-dependent hematological variations to refine the diagnostic and management protocols to mitigate phenotypic misinterpretation.
results.abstract: Serum ferritin levels are evaluated in Iraqi BTT carriers and correlate them with HbA2, erythrocyte indices, and age-dependent hematological variations to refine the diagnostic and management protocols to mitigate phenotypic misinterpretation.
